description: A customer's factory warranty is about to expire. A salesperson calls to offer an extended warranty plan.

nodes.task_description: Identify customers whose factory warranties are expiring within the next 60 days.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a list of eligible customers.

nodes.task_description: Call a customer, explain the benefits of an extended warranty, and present the available coverage options and pricing.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly explains the different tiers of extended warranty plans.

nodes.task_description: If the customer agrees, process the sale of the extended warranty plan.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully sells and activates the new warranty plan for the customer.
